ANKA PRIYA

Lover of synbols

Projects About

The Artist

Anka Priya is a multidisciplinary artist specializing in contemporary drawings and traditional handicrafts. With a focus on organic textures and intricate line work, her pieces explore the intersection of heritage techniques and modern aesthetics.

Currently based in her home studio, she spends her time experimenting with clay glazes and charcoal studies.

Specialties

  • Fine Line Charcoal Drawing
  • Traditional Clay Handicrafts
  • Textile Surface Design
